deferredScopes.reason: Profile schema DSL currently relies on dynamic validator shapes; migrate after schema helper typedefs are introduced.
Operational helper scripts share dynamic progress-task and report objects that need JSDoc contracts before checkJs can be enabled.
Compiler manifests and inventories use dynamic descriptor builders; staged migration requires shared typedefs for compile manifests.
The build pipeline has large dynamic artifact and report objects; the extracted artifact contract is checked first.
Domain graph, lifecycle, schema, and session modules need shared error/result typedefs before full checkJs.
CLI entrypoints parse heterogeneous argv and runtime dependency objects; value-parser and public-contract helpers are checked first.
Infra browser/auth modules wrap process and platform APIs; CLI parser helpers are checked first.
Known-site routers and registries use dynamic profile/action records; availability and blocked-download boundary are checked first.
Skill generation renderers build open-ended document models and need renderer typedefs before checkJs.
Node tests intentionally construct malformed objects and need fixture helper typedefs before checkJs.
Tooling scripts share dynamic report manifests; this scope validator is checked by syntax and runtime tests first.
